things.name: V&A Dundee Design Museum
things.description: Scotland's first design museum on the waterfront — world-class exhibitions in a dramatic Kengo Kuma-designed building

things.name: RRS Discovery (Scott's Antarctic Ship)
things.description: Captain Scott's famous polar research vessel moored at Discovery Point — an enthralling story of the 1901 Antarctic expedition

things.name: The McManus Galleries
things.description: Dundee's Victorian Gothic museum housing fine art, natural history and social history collections

things.name: Dundee Law (Extinct Volcano Viewpoint)
things.description: Dundee's volcanic hill rising 174 m with panoramic views over the Tay estuary and the city

things.name: Verdant Works (Jute Museum)
things.description: Award-winning industrial museum telling the story of Dundee's jute industry inside a restored Victorian mill

things.name: Sensation Science Centre
things.description: Hands-on science centre exploring the five senses through over 60 interactive exhibits

things.name: Broughty Castle & Beach
things.description: 15th-century seaside fortress with free museum overlooking the Tay estuary, beside a popular sandy beach

things.name: Dundee Botanic Garden
things.description: Impressive university botanic garden with glasshouses, native woodland and a Mediterranean collection

things.name: Camperdown Wildlife Centre
things.description: One of Scotland's largest free wildlife centres with wolves, brown bears and Scottish wildcats in Camperdown Park

things.name: Caird Hall & City Square
things.description: Dundee's grand civic concert hall and the vibrant pedestrianised city square at the heart of the UNESCO City of Design
